stages.precondition: Both end_effectors are grasping nothing, and box_red_1 is accessible on top of box_green_1.
stages.postcondition: box_red_1 is grasped with end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: Both end effectors appear empty (not holding any object), and the red box is positioned on top of the green box with its top surface unobstructed and reachable.

post_validation.reason: The red box is between the robot arms, but there is no visible grasp by both the left and right end-effectors on box_red_1.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible on top of box_2, and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with both end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: box_1 (red) is on top of box_2 (green), but both end effectors are in contact with the red box rather than grasping nothing.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible on top of box_2, and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with both end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is on top of the green box (box_2), but both robot end effectors are in contact with/grasping the red box rather than grasping nothing.
